column1:
[Path of the Ranger: Day 1]
Binge-watching Ranger episodes.
Got 5 Speed Ups!

[Path of the Ranger: Day 2]
Debated "Justice" for 6 straight hours.
Got 4 Rich Cats!

[Path of the Ranger: Day 3]
Practiced flashy morphing poses.
Got 1 Rare Ticket!

[Path of the Ranger: Day 4]
Offered heroic help with Mom's chores.
Got 4 Cat CPUs!

[Path of the Ranger: Day 5]
Took a nice nap to recharge energy.
Got 2 Cat Tickets!

[Path of the Ranger: Day 6]
Helped an old lady cross the street.
Got 1 Rare Ticket!

[Path of the Ranger: Day 7]
Gave a tedious self-introduction.
Got 1 Treasure Radar!

[Path of the Ranger: Day 8]
Fogged up helmet with heavy breathing.
Got 5 Sniper the Cats!

[Path of the Ranger: Day 9]
Broke up a petty Cat fight.
Got 1 Rare Ticket!

[Path of the Ranger: Day 10]
Forgot your morphing belt at home.
Got 3 Cat Tickets!

Got 1 Rare Ticket!

Held the map upside down and got lost:
Got 3 Cat Jobs!

[Path of the Ranger: Day 23]
Strategy review for the final showdown.
Got 3 Rich Cats!

Infiltrated the Kaijin lair and...:
